title: Dissolution out of court; procedure; powers of liquidator
doc_html:
§145.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1968, No. 105, §1.  Amended by Acts 1974, No. 610, §1; Acts 1976, No. 312, §1; Acts 2000, 1st Ex. Sess., No. 135, §3, eff. July 1, 2000; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
doc_text:
